title: ANC - Change ANC Mode value (Adaptive/Standard)
scenario: ANC mode selection (Adaptive/Standard) does not persist after closing and reopening the ANC tab in Device Settings
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Tap on ANC to open the ANC tab.
5. Change the ANC mode to Adaptive.
6. Close the ANC tab by navigating back to Audio Settings or Device Settings.
8. Observe the currently selected ANC mode.
9. Change the ANC mode to Standard.
12. Observe the currently selected ANC mode.
expected: The ANC mode value (Adaptive or Standard) selected before closing the ANC tab should persist and remain selected when reopening the ANC tab.
